name: Richard Boykin
bio: Richard Boykin is listed as a Democratic candidate in the 2026 IL-07 open-seat primary. He previously served on the Cook County Board of Commissioners. (Source: Shaw Local candidate list, March 5, 2026: https://www.shawlocal.com/northwest-herald/2026/03/05/illinois-primary-ballot-heres-whos-running-in-the-march-17-election/)

jacket.note: ~$383K raised as of Feb 25, 2026 (FEC). FEC ID: H6IL07370
jacket.donors_note: No itemized donor breakdown available yet. total_raised reflects FEC aggregate total (H6IL07370) — detailed donor records pending ETL import.

career_history.role: Candidate for Cook County Board President
career_history.highlight: Ran against Toni Preckwinkle; lost in primary

policy_platform.position: No detailed current policy platform confirmed from public sources as of March 2026.

social_pulse.summary: Former officeholder with some name recognition on Chicago's South Side. Limited current social media presence.
